label: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 11

extraction.one_line_summary: GROVES Kaden won sprint after Bike-Exchange dominated leadout on arrow-straight 3.6km approach despite losing Yates to COVID same morning
tactical_patterns: UAE replaced Ackermann with Molano in sprint lineup, revealing tactical pivot toward Groves-style finishes over pure speed.
Three-man break into headwind produced slower-than-slowest-forecast pace, suggesting wind calculation errors in break formation strategy.
Pedersen claimed intermediate sprint uncontested with Bennett absent, exposing green jersey as secondary priority for remaining sprint teams.

rider_signals.GROVES Kaden: positive: Bike-Exchange executed full leadout despite losing GC leader Yates morning of stage, showing depth
rider_signals.VAN POPPEL Danny: positive: Finished second without Bennett to lead out, suggesting capable of own sprint finish
rider_signals.PEDERSEN Mads: neutral: Fifth place finish while securing intermediate sprint points indicates green jersey management over stage hunting
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: neutral: Lost second domestique Serry after Alaphilippe abandon, thinning support before mountain stages
